title: Invoice Record
description: One line in data/invoices/active.jsonl. Tracks invoices for Glen's clients.

id.description: Unique invoice ID in format inv-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone offset when record was created

status.description: Current invoice state. 'reminder' = email-detected, not yet in Xero. Overdue is computed from status=sent + due_date < today.

amount.description: Invoice total amount (tax-inclusive). Null for reminders where amount is unknown.

tax_amount.description: Tax component of the invoice amount. Null if unknown.

due_date.description: Payment due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

description.description: Brief description of what the invoice is for.

invoice_number.description: Invoice number (from Xero or manual). E.g., INV-0042.

po_number.description: Client's purchase order number if provided.

project_code.description: Project code for cross-referencing. E.g., PROP-0324.

source_email_id.description: Gmail message ID if invoice record originated from email triage.

xero_invoice_id.description: Xero InvoiceID (UUID) if synced from Xero. Null for email-detected reminders.

amount_paid.description: Amount paid so far (from Xero). Null if unknown.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when invoice was fully paid or written off.
